canonical_definition: A dataset of ten string-edit operations based on a probabilistic context-free grammar, used to evaluate compositional sequence-to-sequence behaviors in language models.
papers: Separating Tongue from Thought: Activation Patching Reveals Language-Agnostic Concept Representations in Transformers
Two Intermediate Translations Are Better Than One: Fine-tuningLLMs for Document-level Translation Refinement
